changelog:
• Hard-gated Firestore when Supabase is active to prevent runtime connections.
• Excluded network, firestore, and sync warnings from main Hub warning view.
• Added failsafe opacity transition backup on sub-app container to fix Chordex-to-Hub return black screens.
• Expanded touch targets on Stagex Scenes bar buttons using CSS pseudo-elements.
• Added Test Stagex Scenes Input action in Developer Tools.

fixed: Hard-gated Firestore on Android when Supabase is active to prevent runtime connections.
Excluded network, firestore, and sync warnings from main Hub warning view.
Added failsafe opacity transition backup to fix Chordex-to-Hub return black screens.
